app.title: KotCat
app.tagline: KotCat Effective flashcard learning system. Remember information faster and longer.

firstScreen.tag: A new approach to language learning
firstScreen.description: KotCat helps you create natural examples with AI, save phrases right from your browser, and learn the language through real-life situations.

hero.title: Start memorizing words consciously
hero.description: Add words from real content, learn them in context, and return to them when it's really necessary.

context.title: Why context is more important than memorization
context.subtitle: Cognitive psychology research confirms: context is the shortest path to fluent speech.
context.subtitle1: Words learned in sentences stay in long-term memory a third longer than lists
context.subtitle2: The brain spends less energy absorbing a word when it sees it in a real situation.
context.subtitle3: You don't memorize a translation—you build natural neural connections like native speakers do.
context.description: Based on Craik and Lockhart's levels-of-processing theory.
context.link: Learn more about the memory theory...

contextAI.title: AI context
contextAI.subtitle: Master words in the context of sentences.
contextAI.item1: ▪ AI picks the most relevant context
contextAI.item2: ▪ Ideal for phrasal verbs, idioms, and fixed expressions
contextAI.accent: Memorize ready-made phrases and sound natural.

chrome.title: Chrome Extension
chrome.subtitle: Turns selected text on websites into cards.
chrome.item1: ▪ Highlight a word or phrase on the page
chrome.item2: ▪ Add it to your dictionary via the browser context menu
chrome.item3: A card will be created automatically in the selected folder.
chrome.accent: Learn more about the extension and installation…

importExport.title: Import and export
importExport.subtitle: Full control over your vocabulary.
importExport.item2: ▪ Upload and download files in Excel format
importExport.accent: You're not locked into one platform.

adaptive.title: Adaptability
adaptive.subtitle: Convenient on any screen.
adaptive.accent: The interface is simple, light, and uncluttered — nothing distracts from learning.

exampleCard.example: Being an overachiever can sometimes lead to communication issues because others may feel pressured to meet your high standards.

wordsImport.title: Collection words
wordsImport.guestPrompt: You are not signed in. Create this collection in a temporary account?

googleSheets.pickerLoadError: Could not load Google Picker. Disable blockers and try again.
googleSheets.exportDescription: Create a new spreadsheet or write cards to a spreadsheet you pick in Google Picker.
